name: Bison Battle Machine
short_description: Bison battle machine – merciless battles on powerful tanks. Survival races and tough battles with realistic physics.
detailed_description:
Bison battle machine – merciless battles on powerful tanks.

The game includes two modes. Survival races and tough battles with realistic physics.

- Powerful futuristic battle machines
- A lot of rivals
- Bosses
- Realistic physics
- Special super weapons
- Additional bonuses

Compete in shooting races, earn stars, level up, upgrade your bison car.
Participate in epic battles and destroy the enemy.
Break, destroy, destroy everything. Drive through the mountains, crush soldiers, blow up the enemy, have fun to the fullest!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Russian
